zodiac. Of these three reductions the one tor conjunction is
the greatest i.e. J. So we have to reduce the Sun's contribution
by a halfonly. The other reductions should not be done. When
this is done you get 9y-10m-l Id. This figure should be
multiplied by 324 and divided by 36S. When this is done you
will get the final result as 8y-9m-27d~52g. Next let us take the
Moon's A.V. chart which has already undergone the rectification.
When you do the Rasi-muliiplication you will get the foliowing
figures in Mesa and other Rasl-s : _28. 20, 0. S, 40. 20. 14, 16,
36. 20. 0 and 24. The total of these is 226. Similarly do the
multiplication for the planets. You will get 32 for Aries. 40
for Virgo. 10 for Scorpio. 20 for Sagittarius, 48 (20 for Sun
and 28 for Venus) for Capricorn, and 10 for Pisces. This gives
a total of 160. Now add up this and the previous product
viz. 226, You get then a grand total of 386. Now multiply
this by 7 and divide the product by 27.
